query: extreme overexposure blown out highlights white sky photograph
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — overexposed/blown highlights, silhouettes against white sky, washed-out high-key minimalism

response.objective_caption: An outdoor view showing mostly leafless deciduous trees in the foreground and middle ground beneath an overcast sky, with the roof and upper side of a white trailer or recreational vehicle visible at the lower left corner, and a paved road or parking area running horizontally behind the trees toward additional trees in the background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A casual, muted snapshot showing mostly leafless deciduous trees in the foreground and middle ground beneath an overcast sky, with washed-out, desaturated grey tones throughout and an amateur vernacular framing that cuts off a white trailer or recreational vehicle at the lower left corner, alongside a paved road or parking area running horizontally behind the trees toward additional trees in the background.
